content.text:
[
{"ruleId":"V1","pass":true,"severity":"blocking","evidence":"Frame 3 makes the doubled periwinkle vector plus its lilac 4.2/x2/8.4 readout the single focus, with the question kept as supporting header and the rose flag subordinate.","suggestion":""},
{"ruleId":"V2","pass":true,"severity":"blocking","evidence":"At most the vector, the stacked score, and the flag caption appear together — well under four novel elements.","suggestion":""},
{"ruleId":"V3","pass":true,"severity":"blocking","evidence":"The 'c1' label sits directly on the vector and no legend or color key is present.","suggestion":""},
{"ruleId":"V4","pass":true,"severity":"blocking","evidence":"All text — the doubling question, the flag caption, the walk-home prompt — annotates a visible referent or poses the beat's question.","suggestion":""},
{"ruleId":"V5","pass":true,"severity":"blocking","evidence":"All text including the 4.2/x2/8.4 stack and captions is comfortably readable at frame scale.","suggestion":""},
{"ruleId":"V6","pass":true,"severity":"blocking","evidence":"Every element sits inside the rounded card with generous margins.","suggestion":""},
{"ruleId":"V7","pass":true,"severity":"blocking","evidence":"The score stack, vector, label, and captions occupy distinct regions with no overlap.","suggestion":""},
{"ruleId":"V8","pass":true,"severity":"blocking","evidence":"Periwinkle vector for the observed candidate, lilac for the score readout, and rose for the pass flag are all consistent with token semantics.","suggestion":""},
{"ruleId":"V9","pass":true,"severity":"blocking","evidence":"The blank build frames are transitional card states in the animation and the populated frames carry only content-bearing elements.","suggestion":""},
{"ruleId":"V10","pass":true,"severity":"blocking","evidence":"The doubling question poses directly without a header, the periwinkle candidate doubles while the lilac 4.2/x2/8.4 stacks headerless, the rose flag marks size passing through, and the walk-home card with its extensions chip closes.","suggestion":""},
{"ruleId":"V11","pass":true,"severity":"advisory","evidence":"The score stack sits immediately right of the vector tip and the flag caption sits beside its flag.","suggestion":""},
{"ruleId":"V12","pass":true,"severity":"advisory","evidence":"Across frames the vector grows and the score reveals in reasoning order rather than materializing whole.","suggestion":""},
{"ruleId":"V13","pass":true,"severity":"advisory","evidence":"The compositions keep clear margins and an unambiguous top-to-bottom reading order.","suggestion":""}
]
